args: nix_bin=$(command -v nix 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -z "$nix_bin" ] && [ -x /run/current-system/sw/bin/nix ]; then nix_bin=/run/current-system/sw/bin/nix; fi; if [ -z "$nix_bin" ] && [ -x /nix/var/nix/profiles/default/bin/nix ]; then nix_bin=/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/bin/nix; fi; if [ -z "$nix_bin" ]; then echo 'nix not found; install Nix or open VSCode from a Nix-enabled shell.' >&2; exit 69; fi; export __NIX_DARWIN_SET_ENVIRONMENT_DONE=1; exec "$nix_bin" develop -c zsh -lc './scripts/resolve_vscode_flutter_sdk.zsh'
